tags.name: User Preferences
tags.description: APIs to manage user-specific UI preferences.

tags.name: Flow Tracing APIs
tags.description: APIs to query tracing data of flows. Allowed scopes: [`cjp:config_read`]

tags.name: Flow V2
tags.description: V2 IR-based flow APIs (FDL 2.0) for LLM/MCP agent use. Allowed scopes are [`cjp:config_write`, `cjp:config_read`]

tags.name: Flow
tags.description: APIs to manage flows/subflows. Allowed scopes are [`cjp:config_write`, `cjp:config_read`]

tags.name: Flow Resource Collection APIs
tags.description: APIs to retrieve RCs for current user with simplified permission metadata for FC UI

tags.name: Flow Template APIs
tags.description: APIs to manage flow templates. Allowed scopes are [`cjp:config_write`, `cjp:config_read`]

get.summary: Get user preferences for a project
get.description: Returns user interface preferences associated with a project.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

put.summary: Update user preferences for a project
put.description: Updates user interface preferences associated with a project.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

post.summary: Create user preferences for a project
post.description: Creates user interface preferences associated with a project.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

delete.summary: Delete user preferences for a project
delete.description: Deletes user interface preferences associated with the authenticated user.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Optional user identifier (ID or username). When specified the corresponding record will be deleted.

get.summary: Retrieve flow/subflow template by template ID.
get.description: Returns flow/subflow template by template ID, if found.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Flow/Subflow Template to be fetched.

parameters.name: ignoreFF
parameters.description: Whether to return the template even if feature flag is off

400.description: Bad Request: Possible causes - mandatory parameter not supplied or parameter value not in right format/datatype.

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

404.description: Not Found: Possible causes - No records found (incorrect ID, no result matching ID).

200.description: OK: Successfully retrieved the requested Flow or Subflow template.

put.summary: Update a flow/subflow template by its ID.
put.description: Updates flow/subflow template by template ID, if found.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Flow/Subflow Template to be updated.

400.description: Bad Request: Possible causes - flow template json not provided in request body, structure of template/flow is not correct, template name is not unique.

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

200.description: OK: Successfully updated the requested Flow or Subflow template.

delete.summary: Delete a flow/subflow template by its ID.
delete.description: Deletes flow/subflow template by template ID, if found.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Flow/Subflow Template to be deleted.

parameters.name: isForceDeletion
parameters.description: If hard delete should be completed rather than soft delete

400.description: Bad Request: Possible causes - Incorrect request parameters sent.

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

404.description: Not Found: Possible causes - No records found matching the provided template id.

200.description: OK: Successfully updated the requested Flow or Subflow template.

put.description: Update offset date used for running flowSyncJob

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the flowsync offset entry

put.description: Provides the ability to update `status` and `retrialAttempt` of an unprocessed summary

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the unprocessed summary entry

delete.description: Delete an unprocessed summary entry with the given id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the unprocessed summary entry

delete.description: Delete a cron schedule entry with the given id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the cron schedule entry

get.description:
Returns a list of flows in response

Scope: `cjp:config_read`. Roles: [`Organizational Full Admin`, `Supervisor`, `Contact Center Service Admin`, `User Admin`]

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines the number of the displayed page. The page number starts from 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Defines the number of items to be displayed on a page. If the number specified is more than allowed max page size, the API will automatically adjust the page size to the max page size.

parameters.name: flowType
parameters.description: Either of 'FLOW' or 'SUBFLOW'.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Filters results based on a comma-separated list of flow IDs. If provided, only flows with those IDs will be fetched in the response.

parameters.name: partialNameSearch
parameters.description: Performs a partial string match on the name of the flow. If the flow name contains the given string it will be fetched.

parameters.name: includePagination
parameters.description: If set to to true then a different paginated response object containing the page metadata (currentPage, totalRecords, pageSize, totalPages) will be returned. The flow objects will be in an array named "data".

parameters.name: isValidation
parameters.description: This field is used by the TM team to validate the existence of functions with certain IDs regardless of the RBAC access of the user.

post.description:
Returns the imported flow/subflow in response.

Scope: `cjp:config_write`. Roles: [`Organizational Full Admin`, `Supervisor`, `Contact Center Service Admin`, `User Admin`]

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Determines whether to overwrite the existing flow or not. Possible values: yes/no.

parameters.name: flowType
parameters.description: Either of 'FLOW' or 'SUBFLOW'.

parameters.name: Content-Length
parameters.description: Content length value in number of bytes.

400.description: BAD REQUEST: Possible causes - Import file size exceeded the limit. File parse error. Flow name is empty. Invalid flow type. Invalid activity.

201.description: CREATED: Flow or Subflow is created.

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

409.description: CONFLICT: A flow/subflow with the same name already exists.

post.summary: Create a new flow/subflow from the JSON string provided.
post.description: Creates a new flow/subflow from the JSON string provided.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Determines whether to overwrite any existing flow/subflow or not. Possible values: true/false

parameters.name: flowType
parameters.description: Either of 'FLOW' or 'SUBFLOW'

parameters.name: templateName
parameters.description: Name of the Template

schema.description: Flow to be created, as JSON string

400.description: Bad Request: Possible causes - flow json not provided in request body, structure of flow is not correct, flow name is not unique, max content length exceeded, etc.

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

201.description: Created: Successfully created the requested Flow or Subflow.

post.summary: Create a new flow/subflow from the template.
post.description: Creates a new flow/subflow from the templateId.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Determines whether to overwrite any existing flow/subflow or not. Possible values: true/false

parameters.name: flowType
parameters.description: Either of 'FLOW' or 'SUBFLOW'

parameters.name: templateName
parameters.description: The name of the Flow/Subflow Template to be used.

parameters.name: flowName
parameters.description: Name of the Flow to be created/overwritten

400.description: Bad Request: Possible causes - template doesn't exist, structure of flow is not correct, flow name is not unique, max content length exceeded, etc.

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

201.description: Created: Successfully created the requested Flow or Subflow.

post.description:
Returns the published flow in response

Scope: `cjp:config_read`. Roles: [`Organizational Full Admin`, `Supervisor`, `Contact Center Service Admin`, `User Admin`]

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: ID of the flow/subflow to export.

parameters.name: skipValidation
parameters.description: Skip validation of the flow before publishing.

parameters.name: TrackingId
parameters.description: ID for tracking.

post.summary: Dry-run validate a FlowIr without persisting (FDL 2.0)
post.description: Normalizes and validates the FlowIr body locally — no data is written. Returns errors and warnings with hints.
Accepts a FlowIr JSON body, normalizes it, validates it, and creates the flow. Returns the created flow with any preflight warnings.

get.description: Returns the current draft of the flow in the enriched FlowIr format. Node names are populated and edge refs are returned as names.

post.description: Normalizes and validates the FlowIr body, then saves it as the current draft. Returns the updated flow with any preflight warnings.

get.description: Without any filters, it returns all flow templates. Possible filters are name and flow type.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Template Name. Example: Business Hours Template

parameters.name: flowType
parameters.description: Template type - FLOW or SUBFLOW

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Desired page number in the paginated query

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of results per page to return for the paginated query

parameters.name: showInactive
parameters.description: Whether to show deleted flows or not

parameters.name: getAll
parameters.description: Whether to show all templates, regardless of feature flag

400.description: Bad Request: Possible causes - mandatory parameter not supplied or parameter value not in right format/datatype.

200.description: OK: Successfully retrieved the requested Flow or Subflow template(s).

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

404.description: Not Found: Possible causes - No records found (matching filters, if supplied).

400.description: Bad Request: Possible causes - flow template json not provided in request body, structure of template/flow is not correct, template name is not unique.

401.description: Unauthorized: Possible causes - User is not authorized to complete this operation.

201.description: Created: Successfully created the requested Flow or Subflow template.

get.description: Fetch unprocessed summaries by status, page parameters, and date range.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status of the unprocessed summaries

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Sets the minimum epoch millis for `endDate` for the unprocessed summaries. Defaults to 30 days ago. Example: 1724803201000

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Sets the maximum epoch millis for `endDate` for the unprocessed summaries. Defaults to the current moment. Example: 1724861461000

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Page size. Number of results to return in a single page

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number. Specify nth page to return

post.description: Create a new unprocessed summary entry with the given parameters

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status. One of 'configured', 'completed', or 'error'

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Page size. Number of results to return in a single page

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number. Specify nth page to return

post.description: Create a new cron schedule entry with the given parameters

get.summary: Get list of RCs for current user with simplified permission flags
get.description: Returns resource collections the user has access to with permissions metadata being simplified to boolean attributes like allowCreate, disabled etc

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines the number of the displayed page. The page number starts from 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Defines the number of items to be displayed on a page.

403.description: Forbidden: User does not have access

get.description: Returns a list of flows in response

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Searches for flows with the given query. The search is case-sensitive.

parameters.name: flowType
parameters.description: Either of 'FLOW' or 'SUBFLOW' or 'ALL'. Default value is 'ALL'.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines the number of the displayed page. The page number starts from 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Defines the number of items to be displayed on a page. If the number specified is more than allowed max page size, the API will automatically adjust the page size to the max page size.

parameters.name: keyValueFilter
parameters.description: Filters results based on key-value pairs. Format: 'key1|value1,key2|value2'. This will add a filter on normalizedFlow collection directly instead of running query on atlas.

get.description:
Returns the exported flow/subflow in response

Scope: `cjp:config_read`. Roles: [`Organizational Full Admin`, `Supervisor`, `Contact Center Service Admin`, `User Admin`]

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: ID of the flow/subflow to export.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Version ID. Possible values are 'draft', 'latest' or version ID like '64b92c004ccd9f3d1c680709'. Defaulted to 'latest'.

parameters.name: flowType
parameters.description: Either of 'FLOW' or 'SUBFLOW'.

get.summary: Get interaction metadata of a Flow Version object
get.description: Retrieves the interaction metadata of a flow version object for a given interaction.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: Flow ID. Example: 64b92c004ccd9f3d1c680709

parameters.name: versionId
parameters.description: Flow Version ID. Example: 64e6cddfb3abcc05186f5f06

parameters.name: interactionId
parameters.description: Interaction ID. Example: 151ed5fb-7181-4103-aef2-b2974d24c3ef

parameters.name: convertIds
parameters.description: Converts process IDs to diagram IDs. Possible values: 'true', 'false'

get.summary: Get traces by interaction ID of a Flow Version object
get.description: Retrieves the tracing data of a flow version object for a given interaction.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: Flow ID. Example: 64b92c004ccd9f3d1c680709

parameters.name: versionId
parameters.description: Flow Version ID. Example: 64e6cddfb3abcc05186f5f06

parameters.name: interactionId
parameters.description: Interaction ID. Example: 151ed5fb-7181-4103-aef2-b2974d24c3ef

parameters.name: currentPage
parameters.description: index of the current page for pagination

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: determines the number of records in a page

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: processId of the flow version

parameters.name: docId
parameters.description: document id of the flow trace

get.summary: Get traces by interaction ID of a Flow Version object
get.description: Retrieves the tracing data of a flow version object for a given interaction.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: Flow ID. Example: 64b92c004ccd9f3d1c680709

parameters.name: versionId
parameters.description: Flow Version ID. Example: 64e6cddfb3abcc05186f5f06

parameters.name: interactionId
parameters.description: Interaction ID. Example: 151ed5fb-7181-4103-aef2-b2974d24c3ef

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: processId of the flow version

parameters.name: docId
parameters.description: document id of the flow trace

get.summary: Get Analytics of a Flow Version object
get.description: Retrieves the analytics data of a flow version object for a given time range.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: Flow ID. Example: 64b92c004ccd9f3d1c680709

parameters.name: versionId
parameters.description: Flow Version ID. Example: 64e6cddfb3abcc05186f5f06

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Epoch milliseconds for the start time of the period of interest. Example: 1720639334000

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: Epoch milliseconds for the end time of the period of interest. Example: 1720639434000

get.summary: List the tags of a flow
get.description:
Returns a list of tags used by the flow

Scope: `cjp:config_read`. Roles: [`Organizational Full Admin`, `Supervisor`, `Contact Center Service Admin`, `User Admin`]

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID. System generated value which is the same across orgs and environments. Always use: 5e5c9ad6d61f870d6d778c1b.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: ID of the flow/subflow to export.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: If true, returns all eligible tags. Otherwise returns tags attached to the flow.

parameters.name: skipRsEPCheck
parameters.description: If true, skips the check on connected Entry Points.

parameters.name: showExtVars
parameters.description: If true, returns the tags with externalized variables for the tag specified by the 'tagId' parameter.

parameters.name: tagId
parameters.description: One of 'Live', 'Latest', 'Test', 'Dev'. The tag must be in use.

get.summary: Get all interactions of a flow across its versions
get.description: Retrieves the list of interactions of a flow across all its versions for a given time range, version ID, tag ID.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Organization ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: Flow ID. Example: 64b92c004ccd9f3d1c680709

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Epoch milliseconds for the start time of the period of interest. Example: 1720639334000

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Epoch milliseconds for the end time of the period of interest. Example: 1720639434000

parameters.name: interactionId
parameters.description: Interaction ID. In case only a certain interaction is needed. Example: 151ed5fb-7181-4103-aef2-b2974d24c3ef

parameters.name: tagIds
parameters.description: Tags IDs. Comma-separated values of tag IDs

parameters.name: currentPage
parameters.description: index of the current page for pagination

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: determines the number of records in a page

parameters.name: versionId
parameters.description: Flow Version ID. Example: 64e6cddfb3abcc05186f5f06

parameters.name: activityDiagramId
parameters.description: Activity Diagram ID. Use this if only interactions touching a specific activity are needed. Example: 84cd6a2a-5b7c-425e-8b00-9d0bd792afe9

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: search for ani, dnis, or interactionId

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: sortOrder for the response, asc or desc

get.description: Reads the specified flow version from the database and returns validation results with human-friendly hints. Use versionId='draft' for the current draft.
Returns the simplified FlowIr representation of the flow. Diagram data is omitted; nodes and edges encode the full logic graph. Node names are populated and edge refs are returned as names.
Returns condensed core and logic activity definitions from the activity registry, optimised for LLM/agent consumption.
Returns the output ports, a ready-to-paste node snippet, and notes for a specific activity. Much lighter than listing all definitions.

get.summary: Get FlowIr-ready node schema for an activity (FDL 2.0)
get.description: Returns the correct group, valid output port conditions, a ready-to-paste nodeTemplate, and activity-specific property hints.

get.summary: Resolve dropdown/select choices for an activity input
get.description: Fetches and materializes the choices for a specific activity input (e.g. queues, entry points, teams). Supports list (all choices), search (text filter), and validate (point-lookup) modes via the search and validate parameters.
Fetch the latest and only offset date used for running flowSyncJob
Fetch decrypt access logs with various filters

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Page size. Number of results to return in a single page

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number. Specify nth page to return

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Filter by orgId

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by userId

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: Filter by flowId

parameters.name: interactionId
parameters.description: Filter by interactionId

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Filter by fromDate in Epoch millis

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Filter by toDate in Epoch millis

FlowTemplate.description: The new value of the Flow/Subflow Template to be saved.

UnprocessedSummary.description: Provide a JSON object containing `interactionId`, `flowVersionId`, `startTime`, and `endTime`
